stonetop.summary: A prickly little wicker-man Fae, a hoarder of trinkets desperate to reclaim his stolen stash.

system.concept: A prickly little wicker-man @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.Ej5WiMs30baKNXW3]{Fae}, a hoarder of trinkets desperate to reclaim his stolen stash.
system.description: The book's worked example of a @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.Ej5WiMs30baKNXW3]{Fae}: a little wicker-man descended from a plant-spirit, once a gardener for some Green Lord, forever collecting trinkets, plants, and rocks. Fiercely protective of his hoard and caring little for his fellow Fae, he became a loner and outcast. He found a tomb to call home and began to rebuild his collection — until a swyn forced him out, and now he desperately wants his stuff back.
